summary: The diff implements a comprehensive Universal Habit Tracker app covering most requirements. The backend (backend/main.mo) handles habits, log entries, streaks, and theme persistence. The frontend includes dashboard with habit cards, circular progress, heatmap, analytics, theme system with 5 built-in themes and custom builder, animations, and responsive navigation. However, several specific acceptance criteria have gaps: Framer Motion is not evidenced (CSS animations used instead), reduced-motion preference handling is not evidenced, the onboarding hero image is not referenced, streak calculation appears frontend-only rather than backend-returned, and the CircularProgress animation uses style manipulation rather than Framer Motion.

missing_requirements.requirement: Framer Motion integration for page transitions, staggered list animations, progress ring draws, and log entry success micro-animations
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows CSS-based animations (animate-fade-in-up, stagger classes, confetti via plain CSS) and no import or usage of framer-motion anywhere in the visible files. REQ-9 explicitly requires Framer Motion.
No evidence of prefers-reduced-motion media query handling in any component or CSS file visible in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Onboarding hero illustration image (onboarding-hero.dim_800x400.png) referenced and displayed in the app
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows the logo-mark image used in Navigation.tsx, but no reference to an onboarding hero illustration or an onboarding page/screen anywhere in the visible files.

missing_requirements.requirement: Streak data is calculated and returned per habit from the backend
missing_requirements.reason: The frontend HabitCard.tsx uses a frontend utility (calculateStreaks from utils/streakCalculator) rather than fetching streak data from the backend. Backend streak calculation and return per-habit is not evidenced in the visible truncated backend code.

missing_requirements.requirement: Progress ring fill animates on mount and on value update using Framer Motion
missing_requirements.reason: CircularProgress uses a useEffect with direct style manipulation for the stroke offset rather than Framer Motion animate.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication integration (useInternetIdentity hook and InternetIdentityProvider with AuthClient)
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists user authentication via Internet Identity as a non-goal, but the hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts file implements a full Internet Identity authentication provider with AuthClient, login, and identity management.
